A2EasyWay – Interactive Lessons 🎓

Elementary English · Past Simple · 4 Lessons

U1
U2
U3
U4

Unit 1 · Lesson 3

Food Adventure

🎯 What will you learn?
✓Talk about food and restaurants
✓Use 4 new verbs in the past simple
✓Understand a short text about a dinner experience
✓Translate sentences about food and dining
🔥 Warm Up
  • 1.What is your favorite food? Do you like spicy food or sweet food?
  • 2.Do you like to cook? What do you usually cook at home?
  • 3.When was the last time you went to a restaurant? What did you order?
📖 Useful Verbs
PresentPastExample🔊
to cookcookedMy mom cooked pasta.
to likelikedI liked the dessert.
to gowentWe went to a restaurant.
to drinkdrankShe drank orange juice.
🗝️ Key Words
restaurant
restaurante
menu
cardápio
waiter
garçom/garçonete
delicious
delicioso
dessert
sobremesa
spicy
apimentado(a)
sweet
doce
fast
rápido
italian
italiano(a)
café
cafeteria
talented
talentoso
📖 Story Time
Dinner at Luigi's 🍝
Yesterday, I went to Luigi's Italian Restaurant with my family. The restaurant was beautiful and the waiter was very friendly.
The menu was beautiful! My father cooked at home every day, but yesterday was special — no cooking! I liked the pizza on the menu. My sister liked the pasta. My mother liked the dessert section!
We bought our food. The waiter was fast. I ate a delicious pizza with cheese. My sister ate spaghetti. The food was amazing! We drank lemonade and water.
For dessert, we ate chocolate cake. It was sweet and delicious! I liked everything at Luigi's. The chef was very talented.
We bought the chef's cookbook at the restaurant. Now my father cooks Italian food at home too!

❓ Comprehension Questions

✏️ Practice Time – Complete the Sentence

A. Write the correct past form of the verb in parentheses:

1.Yesterday, my sister (cook) a delicious cake.
2.We (go) to a new restaurant downtown.
3.I (like) the spicy food a lot.
4.They (drink) juice for lunch.
🔁 Translation Challenge

👆 Click the blue box to reveal the translation

🇬🇧 English → 🇧🇷 Portuguese

I cooked pasta for dinner.Eu cozinhei macarrão para o jantar.
She liked the chocolate dessert.Ela gostou da sobremesa de chocolate.
We went to the new coffee shop.Nós fomos à cafeteria nova.
My father cooked pizza yesterday.Meu pai cozinhou pizza ontem.
The food was delicious!A comida estava deliciosa!
I drank coffee in the morning.Eu tomei café de manhã.
He was at home yesterday.Ele estava em casa ontem.

🇧🇷 Portuguese → 🇬🇧 English

Nós fomos a um restaurante italiano.We went to an Italian restaurant.
Eles beberam água e suco.They drank water and juice.
Eu gostei muito da comida.I really liked the food.
O garçom foi muito simpático.The waiter was very friendly.
Ela cozinhou um bolo de chocolate.She cooked a chocolate cake.
A comida era apimentada.The food was spicy.
A sobremesa estava muito doce.The dessert was very sweet.
🎬 Dialogue – At the Restaurant
Waiter:Good evening! What would you like?
Maria:I liked the pasta on the menu. I'd like that, please.
Waiter:Great choice! And to drink?
Maria:Orange juice, please.
Waiter:Perfect! And you?
Paulo:I went to an Italian restaurant last week. I ate pizza. The same, please!
Waiter:Excellent! We have pizza on the menu today. And you, sir?
Lucas:I'd like a hamburger, please.
Waiter:Sure! And to drink?
Lucas:A soda, please.
Waiter:Great! I'll be right back with your orders.
Unit 1 · Lesson 4

Let's Review! – Unit 1

📖 Story Time – Review
An Amazing Weekend! 🎬
Last weekend was amazing! Yesterday, I went to the cinema with my friend Ana. We bought two tickets online. The screen was incredible! We ate popcorn and candy during the movie. Ana bought the same size of popcorn as me!
The movie was an action film. The plot was very interesting. The special effects were incredible! We watched the trailer for the sequel too. Ana was very happy!
After the movie, we went to a restaurant. We ate delicious food and drank lemonade. The food was amazing! We bought the sequel book at the store. It was an amazing weekend!

❓ Comprehension Questions

✏️ Practice A – Verb + Time Expression

Choose the correct time expression and write the verb in the past:

1.Yesterday, I (go) to the museum.
2.She (eat) popcorn this morning.
3.We (watch) a great movie last night.
4.He (go) to the hotel yesterday.
5.She (watch) a movie last night.
🔁 Translation – PT → EN

👆 Click the blue box to reveal the translation

Ontem, eu fui ao cinema com minha amiga Ana.Yesterday, I went to the cinema with my friend Ana.
Nós compramos dois ingressos online.We bought two tickets online.
Ela comeu pipoca durante o filme.She ate popcorn during the movie.
O enredo foi muito interessante.The plot was very interesting.
Nós assistimos ao trailer da sequência.We watched the trailer for the sequel.
Os efeitos especiais foram incríveis!The special effects were incredible!
✍️ Write About Your Weekend!

Answer the questions and write about your last weekend using the past tense:

Unit 1 · Lesson 1

City Explorer

🎯 What will you learn?
✓Talk about city places and activities
✓Use 4 new verbs in the past simple
✓Understand a short text about exploring a city
✓Translate sentences about city life
🔥 Warm Up
  • 1.Use 4 new verbs in the past simple
  • 2.Understand a short text about exploring a city
  • 3.Translate sentences about city life
📖 Useful Verbs
PresentPastExample🔊
to walkwalkedI walked to the park.
to visitvisitedShe visited the museum.
to findfoundWe found a great café.
to taketookHe took a photo of the bridge.
🗝️ Key Words
street
rua
map
mapa
park
parque
museum
museu
bridge
ponte
corner
esquina
neighborhood
bairro
around
pelo / ao redor de
near
perto de
ago
atrás (tempo)
block
quarteirão
📖 Story Time
A Perfect Sunday in the City 🌆
Last Sunday, I walked around my neighborhood with my friend Leo. We took a map and visited three different streets near the park.
In the morning, we walked to the old bridge downtown. Leo took many photos. The bridge was beautiful! We found a small museum near the corner. We visited it and took some photos inside too.
In the afternoon, we walked to the big park. We found a fantastic food truck near the entrance. We took our food and sat on the grass.
At night, Leo took the bus home. I walked back to my block. It was a perfect Sunday!

❓ Comprehension Questions

✏️ Practice Time – Complete the Sentence

A. Write the correct past form of the verb in parentheses:

1.Yesterday, I (walk) to the park with my dog.
2.She (visit) the museum last Saturday.
3.We (find) a great restaurant near the corner.
4.He (take) a photo of the bridge.
🔁 Translation Challenge

👆 Click the blue box to reveal the translation

🇬🇧 English → 🇧🇷 Portuguese

I walked to the park yesterday.Eu caminhei até o parque ontem.
We found a café near the corner.Nós encontramos um café perto da esquina.
She visited three museums last month.Ela visitou três museus mês passado.
I took the map and walked downtown.Eu peguei o mapa e caminhei pelo centro.
He walked to the museum two days ago.Ele foi ao museu dois dias atrás.
We took photos at the park last Sunday.Nós tiramos fotos no parque no último domingo.

🇧🇷 Portuguese → 🇬🇧 English

Ela visitou o museu na semana passada.She visited the museum last week.
Ele tirou uma foto da ponte.He took a photo of the bridge.
Nós caminhamos pelo bairro de manhã.We walked around the neighborhood in the morning.
Eles encontraram um parque incrível.They found an amazing park.
Eu visitei uma rua nova ontem à noite.I visited a new street last night.
Ela encontrou o mapa na esquina.She found the map at the corner.
🎬 Dialogue – Exploring Downtown
Lisa:Where did you go yesterday?
Mike:I walked downtown with my friend. We visited the museum!
Lisa:Nice! Did you find it easily?
Mike:Yes! We took a map. We found a beautiful park near the bridge too.
Lisa:I walked there last month. I took many photos!
Mike:Me too! The old buildings were amazing.
Unit 2 · Lesson 2

Good Times

🎯 What will you learn?
✓Talk about parties and celebrations
✓Use 4 new verbs in the past simple
✓Understand a short text about a birthday party
✓Translate sentences about celebrations
🔥 Warm Up
  • 1.Do you like parties? What is your favorite kind of celebration?
  • 2.When was the last birthday party you went to? Was it fun?
  • 3.Do you like to dance and sing at parties?
📖 Useful Verbs
PresentPastExample🔊
to celebratecelebratedWe celebrated her birthday.
to inviteinvitedShe invited all her friends.
to dancedancedThey danced all night.
to singsangWe sang Happy Birthday.
🗝️ Key Words
party
festa
birthday
aniversário
surprise
surpresa
balloon
balão
candle
vela
cake
bolo
guest
convidado/a
decoration
decoração
📖 Story Time
The Best Birthday Surprise 🎂
Last Saturday, I went to my best friend Clara's house. It was her birthday! It was a surprise party!
Clara's sister talked to everyone before Clara arrived. She gave us balloons and candles for the house. We helped with everything!
When Clara arrived, everyone gave her a big smile. She was so happy! Her mother gave her a beautiful cake with twenty-five candles. We all sang Happy Birthday together.
After the cake, Clara's cousin gave a short concert with his guitar. All the guests talked and ate. Clara was so grateful.
Clara talked to us all about her plans for next month. It was the best birthday party ever!

❓ Comprehension Questions

✏️ Practice Time – Complete the Sentence

A. Write the correct past form of the verb in parentheses:

1.We (celebrate) my grandmother's birthday last Sunday.
2.She (invite) twenty guests to her party.
3.They (dance) all night at the celebration.
4.We (sing) Happy Birthday together.
🔁 Translation Challenge

👆 Click the blue box to reveal the translation

🇬🇧 English → 🇧🇷 Portuguese

We celebrated her birthday last Saturday.Nós celebramos o aniversário dela no último sábado.
They danced all night at the party.Eles dançaram a noite toda na festa.
She invited her cousin to the surprise.Ela convidou o primo dela para a surpresa.
I danced with my friends last night.Eu dancei com meus amigos ontem à noite.
We celebrated with cake and candles.Nós comemoramos com bolo e velas.
They sang and danced until midnight.Eles cantaram e dançaram até meia-noite.

🇧🇷 Portuguese → 🇬🇧 English

Ela convidou todos os amigos para a festa.She invited all her friends to the party.
Nós cantamos Parabéns juntos.We sang Happy Birthday together.
Eles celebraram com bolo e balões.They celebrated with cake and balloons.
Ela cantou uma música com o violão.She sang a song with the guitar.
Ele convidou trinta pessoas para a festa.He invited thirty people to the party.
Nós celebramos o aniversário dela ontem.We celebrated her birthday yesterday.
🎬 Dialogue – Party Invitation
Pedro:I went to Clara's birthday party last Saturday!
Sofia:Really? I invited her to my party next month.
Pedro:It was amazing! We danced all night.
Sofia:Did everyone sing Happy Birthday?
Pedro:Yes! We celebrated with a huge cake.
Sofia:Sounds perfect! I want my party like that too!
Unit 2 · Lesson 3

Bad Days Happen

🎯 What will you learn?
✓Talk about problems and difficult moments
✓Use 4 new verbs in the past simple
✓Understand a short text about a bad day
✓Translate sentences about problems and feelings
🔥 Warm Up
  • 1.Do you ever have bad days? What usually goes wrong?
  • 2.Have you ever lost something important? How did you feel?
  • 3.What do you do when you feel upset or stressed?
📖 Useful Verbs
PresentPastExample🔊
to loselostI lost my wallet.
to forgetforgotShe forgot her keys.
to missmissedHe missed the appointment.
to feelfeltWe felt very upset.
🗝️ Key Words
problem
problema
wallet
carteira
keys
chaves
appointment
compromisso
headache
dor de cabeça
mistake
erro
relieved
aliviado
upset
chateado/a
terrible
terrível
stressed
estressado
inside
dentro
under
embaixo
📖 Story Time
The Worst Monday Ever 😩
Last Monday was the worst day! Everything went wrong.
In the morning, I felt very tired. I forgot my keys inside the apartment and the door was shut. I lost twenty minutes trying to solve the problem. I felt so upset!
Then I missed my bus. I arrived late at the office. My coworker felt bad for me and helped me. I forgot my wallet at home too, so my coworker paid for my coffee.
In the afternoon, I missed an important appointment because I forgot to write it in my calendar. My boss felt upset. I felt terrible and had a headache.
At night, I lost my phone for one hour. I felt so stressed! Then I found it under the sofa. I felt relieved. Bad days happen to everyone. The next day was much better!

❓ Comprehension Questions

✏️ Practice Time – Complete the Sentence

A. Write the correct past form of the verb in parentheses:

1.I (lose) my wallet yesterday morning.
2.She (forget) her keys inside the car.
3.He (miss) the bus and arrived late.
4.We (feel) very upset about the problem.
🔁 Translation Challenge

👆 Click the blue box to reveal the translation

🇬🇧 English → 🇧🇷 Portuguese

I lost my keys yesterday morning.Eu perdi minhas chaves ontem de manhã.
He missed the appointment last week.Ele perdeu o compromisso semana passada.
She felt very tired last Monday.Ela se sentiu muito cansada na última segunda.
They missed the bus this morning.Eles perderam o ônibus esta manhã.
I felt a headache all afternoon.Eu senti dor de cabeça a tarde toda.
We forgot the meeting last Tuesday.Nós esquecemos a reunião na última terça.

🇧🇷 Portuguese → 🇬🇧 English

Ela esqueceu a carteira em casa.She forgot her wallet at home.
Nós nos sentimos chateados com o problema.We felt upset about the problem.
Eu perdi meu telefone ontem à noite.I lost my phone last night.
Ele esqueceu o compromisso importante.He forgot the important appointment.
Ela perdeu vinte minutos procurando as chaves.She lost twenty minutes looking for the keys.
Ele se sentiu aliviado depois de encontrar a carteira.He felt relieved after finding the wallet.
🎬 Dialogue – Consoling a Friend
Rita:I had a terrible day yesterday. I lost my wallet!
Bruno:Oh no! Did you forget where you put it?
Rita:Yes! I felt so stressed. I missed my bus too.
Bruno:That's awful. Did you find the wallet?
Rita:Yes! I found it under my bed. I felt so relieved!
Bruno:I'm happy you found it! Bad days happen to everyone.
Unit 3 · Lesson 4

Let's Review! – Unit 3

📖 Story Time – Review
Last Weekend – Good & Bad! 🎉😰
On Saturday morning, I felt excited because we celebrated my cousin's birthday. His sister invited twenty guests. I helped with the decorations and gave balloons to everyone. We danced and sang in the afternoon. My cousin met his new neighbors at the party and talked to them for hours.
But in the evening, something went wrong. I lost my wallet at the party. I felt very upset. I missed my last bus and forgot to call my mother. She felt worried.
On Sunday, my neighbor helped me find the wallet. We talked and talked. He met my cousin and gave him a late birthday gift. In the afternoon, I finally found the wallet under a chair! I felt so relieved. Bad days happen, but good people help us!

❓ Comprehension Questions

✏️ Practice A – Verb + Time Expression

Write the verb in the past form:

1.Yesterday, I (meet) my new coworker.
2.She (celebrate) her birthday last month.
3.We (feel) so happy at night.
4.He (lose) his wallet two days ago.
5.They (dance) and (sing) last Saturday.
6.I (forget) the appointment yesterday morning.
🔁 Translation Challenge

👆 Click the blue box to reveal the translation

🇬🇧 English → 🇧🇷 Portuguese

I met my cousin last Saturday.Eu encontrei meu primo no último sábado.
We celebrated her birthday last month.Nós comemoramos o aniversário dela mês passado.
She felt very happy in the evening.Ela se sentiu muito feliz à noite.
They talked for hours last night.Eles conversaram por horas ontem à noite.
He gave his aunt a gift last week.Ele deu um presente para a tia dele semana passada.
I missed the bus two days ago.Eu perdi o ônibus dois dias atrás.

🇧🇷 Portuguese → 🇬🇧 English

Ela esqueceu as chaves ontem de manhã.She forgot her keys yesterday morning.
Ele perdeu a carteira na festa.He lost his wallet at the party.
Nós dançamos e cantamos a noite toda.We danced and sang all night.
Eu me senti aliviado depois de encontrar as chaves.I felt relieved after finding the keys.
Ela convidou vinte pessoas para a festa.She invited twenty people to the party.
Nós nos conhecemos há um mês.We met each other a month ago.
🔢 Put the Story in Order

Number the sentences 1–6 to create a logical story:

__ I felt very upset and missed the last bus home.
__ Last Saturday, my friend invited me to a surprise party.
__ We danced and sang until midnight.
__ At the party, I met many new people and talked to them.
__ In the evening, I lost my wallet at the party.
__ The next day, my neighbor helped me find it.
Unit 3 · Lesson 1

Sport & Adventures

🎯 What will you learn?
✓Talk about sports and physical activities
✓Use 4 new verbs in the past simple
✓Understand a short text about a soccer game
✓Translate sentences about sports
🔥 Warm Up
  • 1.Do you like sports? What is your favorite sport?
  • 2.When was the last time you played a sport or did exercise?
  • 3.Who is your favorite athlete or sports team?
📖 Useful Verbs
PresentPastExample🔊
to play (sports)playedWe played soccer.
to winwonMy team won the match.
to runranI ran in the park.
to kickkickedHe kicked the ball.
🗝️ Key Words
stadium
estádio
team
time/equipe
score
placar/pontuação
coach
técnico/treinador
referee
árbitro
match
partida
champion
campeão
teammate
colega de time
fair
justo/imparcial
trophy
troféu
📖 Story Time
The Big Match ⚽
Last Saturday was the big match! My team played against the champions. We arrived at the stadium early. The coach talked to everyone.
In the first part, we ran a lot but the score was zero. I kicked the ball three times. My friend Tom played very well. The referee was very fair.
In the second part, Tom kicked the ball and we scored! The stadium was so loud! We ran and ran. We felt so tired but happy.
At the end, we won the match! The coach gave us the trophy. We were the new champions! It was the best day ever!

❓ Comprehension Questions

✏️ Practice Time – Complete the Sentence

A. Write the correct past form of the verb in parentheses:

1.We (play) basketball yesterday afternoon.
2.My team (win) the championship last year.
3.I (run) five kilometers this morning.
4.The player (kick) the ball very hard.
🔁 Translation Challenge

👆 Click the blue box to reveal the translation

🇬🇧 English → 🇧🇷 Portuguese

We played soccer last Sunday.Nós jogamos futebol no último domingo.
I ran in the park yesterday morning.Eu corri no parque ontem de manhã.
My team won the trophy last month.Meu time ganhou o troféu mês passado.
The champion ran very fast.O campeão correu muito rápido.
She kicked the ball to her teammate.Ela chutou a bola para a colega de time.
We played tennis two days ago.Nós jogamos tênis dois dias atrás.

🇧🇷 Portuguese → 🇬🇧 English

Meu time ganhou a partida ontem.My team won the match yesterday.
Ele chutou a bola três vezes.He kicked the ball three times.
Nós jogamos vôlei na praia.We played volleyball on the beach.
O árbitro foi muito justo.The referee was very fair.
Eles ganharam o campeonato.They won the championship.
Eu corri no estádio ontem à noite.I ran in the stadium last night.
🎬 Dialogue – After the Game
Coach:Great game, team! You played so well today.
Alex:Thank you, coach! I kicked the ball three times.
Coach:Yes! And the team played together perfectly.
Mia:We won because everyone helped!
Coach:Exactly! You all won as a team.
Alex:When is the next match, coach?
Coach:Next Saturday! Rest well and come back ready!
Unit 3 · Lesson 2

School Days

🎯 What will you learn?
✓Talk about school and studying
✓Use 4 new verbs in the past simple
✓Understand a short text about school
✓Translate sentences about learning
🔥 Warm Up
  • 1.What is your favorite subject at school? Why?
  • 2.Do you like to study? Where do you usually study?
  • 3.What was the last exam or test you took?
📖 Useful Verbs
PresentPastExample🔊
to studystudiedI studied math.
to learnlearnedShe learned English.
to writewroteWe wrote an essay.
to readreadHe read a book.
🗝️ Key Words
notebook
caderno
homework
dever de casa
exam
prova
grade
nota
classroom
sala de aula
library
biblioteca
subject
matéria
formula
fórmula
chapter
capítulo
math
matemática
deadline
prazo final
📖 Story Time
Exam Week 📝
Last week was exam week at school. Every day was busy!
On Monday, I studied for the math exam. I wrote all the formulas in my notebook. I learned many new things.
On Tuesday, I went to the library. I read three chapters of the history book. My friend Lisa studied with me. We learned together.
On Wednesday was the big math exam. I wrote all the answers. I felt nervous but ready!
On Thursday, the teacher gave us our grades. I learned that I did very well! Lisa won the best grade in the class. We were so happy! Now I learned that studying is very important!

❓ Comprehension Questions

✏️ Practice Time – Complete the Sentence

A. Write the correct past form of the verb in parentheses:

1.I (study) English for two hours yesterday.
2.She (learn) to play the piano last year.
3.We (write) a long essay for homework.
4.He (read) an interesting book last weekend.
🔁 Translation Challenge

👆 Click the blue box to reveal the translation

🇬🇧 English → 🇧🇷 Portuguese

I studied for the exam last night.Eu estudei para a prova ontem à noite.
We wrote in our notebooks yesterday.Nós escrevemos nos cadernos ontem.
She learned a new language last year.Ela aprendeu um novo idioma no ano passado.
They wrote the homework together.Eles fizeram a lição de casa juntos.
I read three chapters yesterday.Eu li três capítulos ontem.
We studied together for the test.Nós estudamos juntos para a prova.

🇧🇷 Portuguese → 🇬🇧 English

Ela aprendeu muito na aula.She learned a lot in class.
Ele leu o livro inteiro em dois dias.He read the entire book in two days.
Eu estudei na biblioteca ontem.I studied in the library yesterday.
Nós aprendemos matemática na escola.We learned math at school.
Ela escreveu uma redação incrível.She wrote an amazing essay.
Ele leu o jornal de manhã.He read the newspaper in the morning.
🎬 Dialogue – Talking About Exams
Teacher:How did you study for the exam?
Laura:I studied in the library every day. I wrote many notes!
Teacher:Excellent! Did you read all the chapters?
Laura:Yes! I read everything. I learned so much.
Teacher:I can see that! You did very well.
Laura:Thank you! I want to study more for the next one.
Unit 3 · Lesson 3

Weekend Vibes

🎯 What will you learn?
✓Talk about relaxation and free time
✓Use 4 new verbs in the past simple
✓Understand a short text about a relaxing weekend
✓Translate sentences about rest and entertainment
🔥 Warm Up
  • 1.What do you usually do on weekends?
  • 2.Do you like to listen to music? What kind?
  • 3.When was the last time you took a nap or slept late?
📖 Useful Verbs
PresentPastExample🔊
to listenlistenedI listened to music.
to callcalledShe called her friend.
to sleepsleptWe slept late.
to wakewokeHe woke at noon.
🗝️ Key Words
concert
show / concerto
playlist
lista de reprodução
alarm
alarme
pillow
travesseiro
lyrics
letra da música
relaxation
relaxamento
rhythm
ritmo
📖 Story Time
The Perfect Lazy Weekend 😴
Last weekend was perfect for relaxation!
On Saturday morning, I woke up at eleven. No alarm! I felt so rested. I listened to my favorite playlist while I ate breakfast.
In the afternoon, my friend Loren called me. We talked for one hour. She invited me to a concert at night. I was so excited!
At the concert, we listened to amazing music. The rhythm was fantastic! I learned all the lyrics of the new songs.
On Sunday, I slept until noon. I took a long nap in the afternoon too. My pillow was so comfortable! I called my mom before bed. She asked about my weekend. I told her it was the most relaxing weekend ever!

❓ Comprehension Questions

✏️ Practice Time – Complete the Sentence

A. Write the correct past form of the verb in parentheses:

1.I (listen) to music all day yesterday.
2.She (call) her parents last night.
3.We (sleep) very well last weekend.
4.He (wake) early this morning.
🔁 Translation Challenge

👆 Click the blue box to reveal the translation

🇬🇧 English → 🇧🇷 Portuguese

I listened to the new album yesterday.Eu escutei o novo álbum ontem.
We slept until noon on Sunday.Nós dormimos até o meio-dia no domingo.
She called me two days ago.Ela me ligou dois dias atrás.
They slept on the sofa last night.Eles dormiram no sofá ontem à noite.
I woke at six this morning.Eu acordei às seis esta manhã.
He listened to the concert on the radio.Ele ouviu o concerto no rádio.

🇧🇷 Portuguese → 🇬🇧 English

Ela ligou para o amigo dela ontem à noite.She called her friend last night.
Ele acordou cedo para o trabalho.He woke up early for work.
Eu escutei música o dia todo.I listened to music all day.
Nós acordamos tarde no fim de semana.We woke up late on the weekend.
Ela ouviu a playlist nova.She listened to the new playlist.
Eu liguei para minha mãe ontem.I called my mom yesterday.
🎬 Dialogue – Making Weekend Plans
Nina:What did you do last weekend?
Leo:I slept until noon! I was so tired.
Nina:Lucky! I woke up early and called my friend.
Leo:What did you do together?
Nina:We listened to music and went to a concert at night.
Leo:Sounds great! I just slept all day!
Unit 4 · Lesson 4

Let's Review! – Unit 4

📖 Story Time – Review
My Busy Week 🗓️
Last week was very busy but fun! On Monday morning, I woke early. I studied for my math exam in the library. I wrote many notes in my notebook. I learned so much!
On Wednesday, my team played a big soccer match. We ran a lot on the field. I kicked the ball twice and we won! The coach gave us all a trophy. We felt like champions!
On Friday night, my friend called me. We went to a concert together. I listened to my favorite band. The music was incredible! I learned all the lyrics by the end.
On Saturday, I slept until noon. I took a long nap in the afternoon. I was so tired from the week! I woke in the evening and read a book. It was a perfect mix of study, sports and fun!

❓ Comprehension Questions

✏️ Practice A – All Unit 4 Verbs

Write the verb in the past form:

1.Yesterday, I (play) tennis.
2.She (study) for the exam last night.
3.We (listen) to music in the morning.
4.He (win) the match two days ago.
5.They (read) the book last weekend.
6.I (wake) very late on Sunday.
🔁 Translation Challenge

👆 Click the blue box to reveal the translation

🇬🇧 English → 🇧🇷 Portuguese

I played soccer last Saturday.Eu joguei futebol no último sábado.
We listened to music yesterday.Nós ouvimos música ontem.
She read a book last weekend.Ela leu um livro no fim de semana passado.
They ran in the park two days ago.Eles correram no parque dois dias atrás.
He slept until noon on Sunday.Ele dormiu até o meio-dia no domingo.
I learned English last year.Eu aprendi inglês no ano passado.

🇧🇷 Portuguese → 🇬🇧 English

Ela estudou para a prova ontem à noite.She studied for the exam last night.
Ele ganhou o troféu na semana passada.He won the trophy last week.
Nós acordamos cedo ontem de manhã.We woke up early yesterday morning.
Eu escrevi no meu caderno ontem.I wrote in my notebook yesterday.
Ela ligou para mim ontem à noite.She called me last night.
Nós jogamos basquete no fim de semana.We played basketball on the weekend.

Write 6–8 sentences about your perfect week. Use verbs from Unit 4, time expressions and parts of the day:
